project.name: henrybpan.com
project.description: Personal website — manifesto homepage, essays, short thoughts, recommendations, and a work-with-me contact page. Serves as a personal brand hub and record of ongoing intellectual development.
project.stack: Jekyll on GitHub Pages. All pages use _layouts/default.html with YAML front matter, except index.html which is standalone.

brand.concept: The Solitary Wanderer — after Caspar David Friedrich's 'Wanderer Above the Sea of Fog'. Someone who travels alone toward the sublime, reaches peaks others haven't considered.
brand.emotional_register: Thesis statement from someone building something serious. Warm but disciplined. Contemplative, never navel-gazing.
anti_patterns: Framer-style animations that feel like everyone's portfolio
Copy that could appear on someone else's site
Subtitles or page descriptions that state the obvious

typography.display_font: Cormorant Garamond — logo text, page titles, nav overlay links, manifesto title, rec card titles
typography.body_font: EB Garamond — body copy, annotations, labels, filter buttons, footer
typography.rule: Both fonts are serif. The site should feel like reading a journal, not a SaaS dashboard. No Inter, Roboto, or sans-serif as a primary font.

logo.placement: Left of 'HENRY PAN' text in header, both vertically centered, gap 0.65rem
logo.fallback: If logo.png is missing, show a 26x26 filled black circle placeholder

design_system.animations: Fade-up on page load: opacity 0→1, translateY 14px→0, ~0.8s ease, 0.15s delay. CSS only.
design_system.borders: 1px solid var(--rule) for header bottom and footer top. Square corners throughout.

header.left: Logo image + 'HENRY PAN' (Cormorant Garamond, 500, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.1em), wrapped in <a href='/'>
header.right: Two-bar hamburger button only. No inline nav links.
header.hamburger: 22px wide bars, 1.5px height, 5px gap. Animates to X when open. Toggles nav overlay. Locks body scroll.
header.style: position: fixed. Background var(--white). 1px bottom border var(--rule). Padding 1.35rem 2.5rem.

nav_overlay.style: Full viewport. Background var(--white). Centered column of links.
nav_overlay.link_style: Cormorant Garamond, 400 weight, clamp(2rem, 5.5vw, 3rem), color var(--muted). Hover: var(--black) + gold underline from left.

right_column: Line 1: work@henrybpan.com — mailto link, EB Garamond, 0.78rem, var(--muted), gold on hover
Line 2: NoVA | University of Virginia — EB Garamond, italic, var(--muted), 0.8rem
footer.right_column_note: Email is ABOVE location on the right side. Copyright is on the left. This exact order is required.
footer.style: Not fixed. 1px top border var(--rule). Padding 1.5rem 2.5rem. Flex row, space-between, align items to flex-end.

urls.structure: Clean trailing-slash URLs via _config.yml permalink: pretty

home.layout: Standalone — full CSS/JS inline, not using Jekyll layout
home.manifesto_title: The Internet is Dying—and it's Your Fault
home.section_nav_links: Essays · Thoughts · Recommendations · Work With Me
home.note: Gold dots (·) between nav links. Not pipes. Not slashes.

essays.description: Vertical list. Each item: date (Month Dth, Year) in muted text above, title as link, one-line excerpt. Separated by 1px rules.

thoughts.description: Stream of short takes, 1 sentence to 2 paragraphs. Newest first. Date above each in muted uppercase. No titles, no play buttons, no audio. 1px rules between entries.

recommendations.description: Grid of recommendation cards. Page title 'Recommendations' only — no subtitle.

work_with_me.primary_copy: If you are a creator who wants to work with me, DM me on Instagram. If you are a brand, email work@henrybpan.com.
work_with_me.icon_style: Outline SVG, 24-28px, var(--muted), gold on hover

data_files.description: Content for thoughts, essays, and recs is stored in _data/ JSON files. The HTML templates loop over these files to render content. This enables the CLI tool to add content by editing JSON only — never touching HTML.

_data/thoughts.json.description: Array of thought objects, newest first

schema.text: string — the thought text, plain or with basic HTML like <em>

_data/essays.json.description: Array of essay metadata objects, newest first

cli_tool.description: A Node.js terminal CLI so Henry can add essays, thoughts, and recs without opening VS Code or Claude Code. Run with: node add.js
cli_tool.dependencies: Only Node.js built-ins — no npm install required. Use readline for prompts, fs for file operations.

behavior.startup: Show a simple menu: (1) Add Thought  (2) Add Essay  (3) Add Rec  (4) Exit
add_thought: Prompt: 'Thought text:' (multi-line, end with a blank line or type END)
Auto-generate today's date in 'Month Dth, Year' format with ordinal suffix
Confirm: show the entry, ask 'Add this? (y/n)'
Success message: 'Thought added. Run jekyll serve to preview.'
add_essay: Auto-generate slug from title (lowercase, hyphens, no special chars)
Create the essay HTML file at essays/[slug].html with Jekyll front matter and a content placeholder
Success message: 'Essay stub created at essays/[slug].html — open it to write your content.'
add_rec: Prompt: 'Image filename (or press Enter to skip):'
Success message: 'Rec added. If you have a cover image, drop it in /assets/images/recs/[filename].'
ux_notes: Use colors in terminal output (green for success, yellow for prompts, red for errors) via ANSI codes
Show a brief welcome message on startup with the site name
After any action, ask 'Add another? (y/n)' before returning to menu or exiting
Handle Ctrl+C gracefully with a 'Goodbye.' message

target_layout._data/: thoughts.json, essays.json, recs.json — single source of truth for all content
target_layout._layouts/default.html: Shared layout: header, nav overlay, footer. Jekyll {{ content }} injection. Full comments.
target_layout.assets/css/: loading-bar.css — unchanged. Add main.css for shared styles if needed.
target_layout.assets/images/: logo.png (Henry's logo), recs/ subfolder for rec thumbnails
target_layout.essays/: Individual essay HTML files using Jekyll layout
target_layout.context.json: This file — project documentation for AI tools

codebase_structure.documentation_standard: Every file should have a comment block at the top explaining its purpose. CSS sections should be separated by labeled comment blocks (e.g. /* === HEADER === */). JS functions should have one-line comments above them.
codebase_structure.no_duplicate_css: All shared styles live in _layouts/default.html <style> block or a linked main.css. No copy-pasted CSS across pages.
codebase_structure.no_dead_code: Remove: old video background code, old sidebar nav, old coaching page nav links, any unused CSS classes, the old mobile overlay from the previous nav system.

files_to_preserve_unchanged: Essay body content (the written words inside on-marty-supreme.html and pickupartist.html)
quality_checklist: Hamburger on every page — homepage and all inner pages.
No inline nav links in header — only logo left, hamburger right.
Footer: copyright LEFT. Email (above) + location (below) RIGHT.
Logo image renders left of site name in header.
All URLs clean with trailing slashes: /essays/, /thoughts/, /recommendations/, /work-with-me/.
Recommendations filter: exactly All, Books, Essays, Podcasts, Music. No Films.
Recommendations page: no subtitle, no description — title and filter bar only.
Thoughts and essays pull from _data/ JSON files via Jekyll loops.
CLI tool runs with 'node add.js' from project root, no npm install.
CLI auto-generates correct date format with ordinals.
No Inter or sans-serif fonts in body copy.
Gold dots (·) separate section nav links on homepage.
Work With Me icons: Instagram, YouTube, X, TikTok, LinkedIn, Email — outline, muted, gold on hover.
Every file has a top-of-file comment explaining its purpose.
No dead code, no duplicate CSS, no leftover video background references.
Mobile: test at 375px. Grid collapses to 2 cols, header readable, overlay functional.
